Who We Are

We Are Always
Ready For Business

LuxEstate Kenya is Nairobi's premier luxury property agency, connecting discerning buyers and sellers with exceptional residential properties across the city's most coveted neighbourhoods.

From the serene green belt of Karen to the vibrant energy of Westlands, we bring unmatched market expertise and genuine passion for helping clients find their perfect home.

  • Verified and legally cleared properties
  • End-to-end transaction support
  • Dedicated personal property advisors
  • Transparent pricing — no hidden fees
Talk To An Agent
What We Offer

Our Services

🏠

Property Sales

We market and sell premium residential properties with precision, connecting qualified buyers with their ideal homes quickly and transparently.

🔑

Property Management

Comprehensive management of your investment property — from tenant screening and rent collection to maintenance and compliance.

📋

Legal & Conveyancing

We partner with top conveyancing firms to ensure every transaction is legally sound, titles are clean, and transfers are seamless.

📐

Interior Design

Our partner designers transform your new property into a bespoke luxury home that reflects your taste and lifestyle.

💼

Investment Advisory

Strategic guidance on where and when to invest in Nairobi real estate for maximum long-term capital appreciation.

🤝

Mortgage Facilitation

We connect buyers with leading Kenyan banks and SACCOs to secure the best mortgage rates for your dream home.

Get In Touch

Let's Find Your
Perfect Property

Our agents are available Monday–Saturday, 8AM–7PM. Schedule a viewing, ask about a listing, or simply let us know what you're looking for.
